title: State Machine Lifecycle Protocol: Unified Async Resource States
essence: Speech Recognition, Async Operations und Agent Regimes teilen dieselben Lifecycle-Phasen (IDLE → STARTING → ACTIVE → PAUSED → STOPPING → ERROR). Unified State Machine mit Guard Conditions verhindert ungültige Transitionen.
steps: Standard States definieren: IDLE, STARTING, ACTIVE, PAUSED, STOPPING, ERROR
Guard Conditions: canTransition(from, to) returns boolean
Ref-based State (nicht React State) für synchrone Checks
Cooldown Period zwischen State Changes (rapid cycling verhindern)
Exit Conditions: max_restarts, timeout, error_count Thresholds

evidence.notes: GLM5: IDLE/STARTING/ACTIVE/PAUSED/STOPPING/ERROR — komplettstes State Schema aller Modelle
